bulkDataProductBag.productDescriptionText: Bibliographic and assignments static patent data compiled into file sets. The Weekly Datasets (10-year increments) can be downloaded in bulk.
Bibliographic and assignments static patent data compiled into file sets. The Delta Datasets (daily increments) can be downloaded in bulk.

The annual datasets are constructed from PatentsView Granted Patent Disambiguated Data and provided in small, easy to manipulate csv files. Each yearly data table provides information about the inventors and assignees associated with patents granted that year.
Contains annual files of long-text data for pre-grant publications from 2001 to the present. The available text fields are: Brief Summary, Claims, Detail Description, and Drawing Description.
bulkDataProductBag.productTitleText: PatentsView Pre-Grant Publication Long Text Data

bulkDataProductBag.productDescriptionText: Contains annual files of long-text data for granted patents from 1976 to the present. The available text fields are: Brief Summary, Claims, Detail Description, and Drawing Description.
bulkDataProductBag.productTitleText: PatentsView Granted Patent Long Text Data

bulkDataProductBag.productDescriptionText: The sorted tables are reorganized bibliographic data that more accurately represent the roles and order of inventors, applicants, and assignees on patent applications (Pre-Grant Publications) and granted patents. They correct inconsistencies in the original XML source data that resulted from changes implemented under the Leahy-Smith America Invents Act, providing an additional resource for users while the existing tables remain available.

Includes 35 files for patents granted from January 1976 to the present. Information is included on applicants, assignees (both disambiguated and not disambiguated), inventors (both disambiguated and not disambiguated), and locations of inventors, assignees, and applicants. Also included are technology categories, patents and non-patent literature cited, examiner name, and statements of government interest.

Includes 25 files for pre-grant publications issued since the introduction of pre-grant publication in 2001. Information is included on applicants, assignees (both disambiguated and not disambiguated), inventors (both disambiguated and not disambiguated), and locations of inventors, assignees, and applicnts. Also included are technology categories and statements of government interest.

The “Office action” is a written notification to the applicant of the examiner’s decision on patentability. It generally discloses the reasons for any rejections, objections, or requirements and includes relevant information or references that the applicant may find useful for responding to the examiner and deciding whether to continue prosecuting the application. The full-text of Public Office Actions is bundled as a JSON file in downloadable weekly zip files. Each zip file contains weekly office action data in JSON format from 01/06/2020 to present.

Contains the concatenated full-text of each patent grant document issued weekly (Tuesdays) from January 1, 1976 to December 25, 2001 (excludes images/drawings). This is the subset of the Patent Grant Full Text Data with Embedded TIFF Images.
bulkDataProductBag.productTitleText: Patent Grant Full-Text Data (No Images) - APS
